content_blocks.html:
Free & Confidential Coverage Check

Find Rehabs That Accept Insurance

{business} helps you find drug and alcohol rehabs and treatment centers that accept your health insurance — detox, inpatient, and outpatient. Tell us your plan and we’ll connect you with covered care. No cost, no obligation.

Verify My CoverageBrowse Rehabs →
✓ Most major insurers✓ 100% confidential✓ No referral fees

How to Find a Rehab That Accepts Your Insurance

Most major health plans cover medically necessary addiction and mental-health treatment under their behavioral-health benefits — often including medical detox, residential and inpatient care, partial hospitalization (PHP), and intensive outpatient (IOP) programs. What’s covered, and how much you pay out of pocket, depends on your specific plan. {business} helps you cut through the paperwork: tell us your insurer and we’ll help you understand your benefits and match you with rehabs that accept your coverage.

Verifying your coverage is free and confidential, with no obligation to enter treatment. Start by choosing the carrier you’re insured under below.

Rehabs by Insurance Carrier

AetnaCignaBlueCross BlueShieldUnitedHealthcareHumanaKaiser PermanenteMedicaidMedicareTricare

content_blocks.fc_subheading: Most health plans cover treatment. We help you find centers that accept yours.

columns.alt: Rehabs and treatment centers that accept health insurance
columns.heading: Covered Options
columns.text: Detox, inpatient, and outpatient rehab are commonly covered. We help you find centers that accept your plan.

columns.alt: Treatment centers accepting major insurance carriers
columns.heading: Any Major Insurer
columns.text: Aetna, Cigna, UnitedHealthcare, Blue Cross Blue Shield and more — we match you with rehabs that take your plan.

columns.heading: Free & Confidential
columns.text: Checking your options costs nothing and carries no obligation to enter treatment.

content_blocks.steps_heading: How We Match You With a Rehab That Takes Your Insurance

steps_items.heading: Call for a Free Check
steps_items.text: Share your insurance details. No cost, no obligation.

steps_items.heading: We Verify Your Insurance
steps_items.text: We confirm what your plan covers and which centers accept it.

steps_items.heading: Connect With Covered Rehabs
steps_items.text: We connect you with treatment centers that accept your insurance.

fq_items.question: Which treatment centers accept health insurance?
fq_items.answer: Many drug and alcohol rehabs accept major insurance. The centers available to you depend on your specific plan — {business} can check your options for free.

fq_items.question: Does insurance cover drug and alcohol rehab?
fq_items.answer: Most plans cover at least part of addiction treatment because of federal parity and ACA rules. Exact benefits depend on your plan.

fq_items.question: How do I find a rehab that takes my insurance?
fq_items.answer: Start with a free benefits check. {business} confirms your coverage and connects you with treatment centers that accept it.

fq_items.question: Is this free and confidential?
fq_items.answer: Yes. It is free, private, and there is no obligation to enter treatment.

content_blocks.cb_text: Find a treatment center that accepts your insurance.

content_blocks.fc_subheading: Coverage depends on your {company} plan. Centers that accept {company} commonly provide:

columns.heading: Medical Detox

columns.heading: Inpatient & Residential
columns.text: Many {company} plans include residential rehab, subject to your plan.

columns.heading: Outpatient (PHP & IOP)

columns.text: Medication-assisted treatment and mental-health care may be included.

fq_items.question: What rehabs accept {company}?
fq_items.answer: Many drug and alcohol rehabs accept {company}. The centers available depend on your specific {company} plan — we can check for free.

fq_items.question: Does {company} cover drug and alcohol rehab?
fq_items.answer: In most cases {company} plans include some coverage for addiction treatment. Exact benefits depend on your plan.

fq_items.answer: Depending on your plan, {company} may cover detox, inpatient and residential rehab, PHP, IOP, outpatient care, and medication-assisted treatment.
